name: Cajun Shrimp Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté for approximately four minutes until translucent.
2. Stir in garlic, thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and basil. Cook at low heat for five more minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, diced tomatoes, sugar, and green onions to the pan. Mix well.
4. Gradually add chicken broth over lowish heat. Simmer until the liquid is reduced by half, about one-half hour.
5. In a separate pan or pot, melt butter and sauté shrimp with garlic until three-quarters cooked (pink but not totally opaque).
6. Combine cooked pasta and sauce in the large pan. Mix well.
7. Add grated Parmesan cheese and cook for an additional two minutes.
8. Serve hot.
